title: Find Her Demo
lyrics: You know sometimes it feels so wrong, it's just wrong, it's so wrong Found something new, did not lose you Found something new, now you're untrue I lost it, you lost I lost, we bought Even when it all gets out the door Even when it all goes to black No blaming it, we rock like that We get back, we get, we get back You behave, even if you behave You behave, don't hate It's just not what we're meant to be And you'll see You'll grow to hate me, you'll grow to despise Everything about me when I tell you the truth But what lies behind the eyes is demon filled in vain It's like something that you wouldn't take home But I belong, I do, I belong, I do Maybe not the right skin Maybe not the right wings But it hurts, yeah And it hurts the same when it comes the same When it's all a game and you feel ashamed By the way that you say you're Yeah, last name Yeah, man, took it to a voice and we got back to buy it Then we got a minute, it wasn't about it It wasn't worth the time, trouble back to see For you to go crazy and blame me You are too much for me to handle You know you got yourself in that level You know you're to blame, you know you're ashamed You know you can't even be truthful to your own No That's why you threw me under the bus Under the bus, under the bus Fuck what you say, fuck what you say I got some good things happening now Yeah, she just like you, but better, better, better Found another you, you Yeah, I found another you, hey She doesn't want that She got one of her own tracks She got her own top man And she keep it like that She got a wisdom like you'll get to the next one She got more than you can guess on More than you can even be Or more than you can even breathe But you're still beautiful, you see Sorry you get left behind Sorry you don't have a crime Sorry you couldn't just be there everywhere Would've died for you, I swear I would Would've died Now I, now I, now I Think you're just a fucking diner So how long will you find her?

lyricsSegments.text: You know sometimes it feels so wrong, it's just wrong, it's so wrong
Found something new, did not lose you
Found something new, now you're untrue
I lost it, you lost
I lost, we bought
Even when it all gets out the door
Even when it all goes to black
No blaming it, we rock like that
We get back, we get, we get back
You behave, even if you behave
You behave, don't hate
It's just not what we're meant to be
And you'll see
You'll grow to hate me, you'll grow to despise
Everything about me when I tell you the truth
But what lies behind the eyes is demon filled in vain
It's like something that you wouldn't take home
But I belong, I do, I belong, I do
Maybe not the right skin
Maybe not the right wings
But it hurts, yeah
And it hurts the same when it comes the same
When it's all a game and you feel ashamed
By the way that you say you're
Yeah, last name
Yeah, man, took it to a voice and we got back to buy it
Then we got a minute, it wasn't about it
It wasn't worth the time, trouble back to see
For you to go crazy and blame me
You are too much for me to handle
You know you got yourself in that level
You know you're to blame, you know you're ashamed
You know you can't even be truthful to your own
No
That's why you threw me under the bus
Under the bus, under the bus
Fuck what you say, fuck what you say
I got some good things happening now
Yeah, she just like you, but better, better, better
Found another you, you
Yeah, I found another you, hey
She doesn't want that
She got one of her own tracks
She got her own top man
And she keep it like that
She got a wisdom like you'll get to the next one
She got more than you can guess on
More than you can even be
Or more than you can even breathe
But you're still beautiful, you see
Sorry you get left behind
Sorry you don't have a crime
Sorry you couldn't just be there everywhere
Would've died for you, I swear I would
Would've died
Now I, now I, now I
Think you're just a fucking diner
So how long will you find her?
